name: debounce_cx1-rtl
description: Auto-generated phase-grouped gen-rtl TodoTracker for debounce_cx1: one visible TODO per SSOT ledger group plus a final deterministic gate. The full contract/evidence ledger remains in rtl_todo_plan.json; the gate loops back to Phase 1 until that ledger closes.

ledger_groups.title: Prepare SSOT-derived RTL generation authority
Implement locked req contracts in RTL
Implement top module, ports, reset, and filelist
Implement Verilog include parameters and constants
Execute SSOT-authored rtl-gen workflow TODOs
Implement function_model inputs, outputs, and transactions
Implement function_model preconditions and invariants
Implement function_model state and side effects
Implement cycle_model handshake, backpressure, and arbitration
Implement cycle_model timing, ordering, pipeline, and reset
Implement SSOT dataflow and ordering behavior
Implement feature-level RTL contracts
Implement error handling and recovery behavior
Close security, integration, and synthesis constraints
Preserve RTL evidence for SSOT test scenarios
Preserve FL-vs-RTL module equivalence mapping
Implement debug_observability RTL contracts
Implement dft RTL contracts
Close RTL authority and provenance gates
Close RTL traceability and implementation-depth gates
Close top IO, hierarchy, and connection gates
Run DUT-only compile and lint closure gates
Close cycle, assertion, FL-vs-RTL, and coverage gates

ui_grouping.detail_policy: One visible TODO per SSOT ledger group drives implementation; a final deterministic gen-rtl gate (derive_rtl_todos.py --audit-rtl) verifies every ledger row and loops back to Phase 1 on failure, while preserving every per-contract row in rtl_todo_plan.json.

tasks.content: [gen-rtl gate] Verify every RTL item is well-formed for debounce_cx1
tasks.activeForm: Running deterministic RTL build gate for debounce_cx1
tasks.detail:
Deterministic gate after 23 implementation phase(s) for debounce_cx1.
Runs derive_rtl_todos.py --audit-rtl: every required ledger row must close and static checks must pass.
On failure this loops back to Phase 1 — read the audit output to see which group/rows are still open, repair RTL, then this gate reruns.
Also run rtl_compile_report.py and dut_lint_report.py and fix unwaived errors before declaring done.
tasks.criteria:
derive_rtl_todos.py --audit-rtl exits 0 (rtl/rtl_todo_plan.json gate.status=pass)
summary shows open_required_todos=0, static_missing=0, blockers=0, orphans=0, all_required_todos_pass=true
Every required ledger row has todo_completion.status=pass
rtl_compile_report.py reports no compile errors; dut_lint_report.py reports no unwaived DUT-only lint errors
